nodes.label: Stage 1: pull plumber POIs from Overture Maps and insert into leads table.
Single nation-wide Overture query. Gets all ~107k US plumbers (no bbox gaps).
Stage 2: apply pre-enrichment ICP filter (phone + state).
Stage 3: enrich qualified leads (website + gmaps + owner + facebook).
Stage 4: LLM-score enriched leads into sales-intel notes.
Export enriched leads to CSV for import into Smartlead / GHL / power dialer.
Backfill review counts from Google Maps. Runs SLOW (1 req/15s) to avoid rate lim
Enrichment: email + owner name + site_builder (for ICP tiering).  Sources:   1.
Determine ICP tier from available signals.
Enrichment: email + owner + site_builder + ICP tier.
Map an Overture category to a trade tag for segmentation.
Query Overture Maps parquet for plumber POIs in a state's bounding box.
Query Overture Maps for ALL US plumbers without state bbox filtering.      The s
Run a single nation-wide discover query. Uses the address region as the state.
Stage-2 ICP filter: phone required, no franchises, auto-dedup by phone+website.
Google Maps enrichment: rating + review count + review samples.
Search Google Maps, click into the listing, extract data via page interaction.
Extract review count from visible text. Handles formats:        (459)  ·  (1.4K)
Parse Google Maps data from search_and_fetch output.
Fallback: Google search "company owner" and parse the result snippets.
Try to find the owner's name by Google-searching for it. Best-effort.
Return cleaned name or None if it looks like junk.
Full owner lookup chain — kept for optional use.
Free email + contact finder — scrapes the plumber's own website and Yellow Pages
URL-decode and strip leading garbage from a captured email string.
Higher score = better. Personal addresses score higher than role addresses.
Pull all unique valid emails from a page, best-scored first.
Fetch the plumber's own website and try to find a contact email.
Search Yellow Pages for email. Returns {email: str} or {}.
